prompt: Create exactly one standalone character overlay asset of this bear with these additions only: checkered scarf, picnic blanket under the bear, and a strawberry sandwich held by the bear. HARD CONSTRAINTS: transparent background only; no scene/background elements; no trees; no sky; no ground; no grass; no shadows cast on environment; no environment props beyond the bear, scarf, picnic blanket, and sandwich. The output must be character-only for compositing. Keep the original bear style, proportions, line weight, and palette consistency. Cute kids-game 2D style.
